summary: A three-story residential building with a distinctive dome-shaped brick roof. The structure features a symmetrical design with sandstone/yellow concrete walls, dark stone pillar supports at corners, horizontal wood/dark wood trim bands between floors, and regular window placements. The building is surrounded by a white fence perimeter and sits on a dirt foundation.

shape.overall_form: rectangular block with domed roof crown

rebuild_hints: Build three-story rectangular base with sandstone blocks
Place dark stone pillars at all four corners, extending full height
Add horizontal wood/dark wood trim bands between each floor level
Install windows in regular 2-3 block spacing on each floor
Construct dome roof using brick blocks in stepped/pyramidal pattern
Surround entire structure with white fence blocks at ground level
Ensure bilateral symmetry across both axes
Use dirt/coarse dirt for foundation and ground area
uncertainties: Exact window material (glass vs. other transparent blocks) - appears to be glass but partially obscured
Interior layout and room configuration not visible from exterior views
Precise height of dome roof - estimated at 4-5 blocks above main structure
Exact type of dark trim material - could be dark oak wood or dark stone
Whether pillars are solid or hollow - appears solid from views
Entrance door location and type not clearly visible in any view
